title: BEVOAuthOSS
description: An Open Source port of Beta Evolutions authentication to fabric!
body:
A port of [Beta Evolutions](https://evolutions.johnymuffin.com/) auth to Fabric using [OrnitheMC](https://ornithemc.net/)!
This lets you skip the /login command and manual Mojang account ownership verification as long as you are logged into Mojang in your launcher.
### This connects to the following servers for authentication purposes
- `session.minecraft.net`
- `checkip.amazonaws.com` or `icanhazip.com`
- `auth1.evolutions.johnymuffin.com`
- `auth2.evolutions.johnymuffin.com`

**This does not allow connecting to the server without a Minecraft account, purchase Minecraft at** 
https://minecraft.net
